name: He Xiangning: Ink & Intent
description: Explore over 50 ink works and archival materials together, then turn the gallery stroll into a thoughtful conversation over dinner.

name: Passion is Volcanic
description: A bold, conversation-heavy exhibition date about desire, the body, and how art blurs the line between the intimate and political.

name: Singapore Stories
description: Wander through Singapore's art history together and trade stories about the works, ideas, and moments that feel most personal.

name: FRAMED: A Murder Mystery
description: Solve clues across the Gallery as a team in a playful mystery date that mixes puzzles, suspense, and beautiful spaces.

name: How to Art with Friends
description: Follow ten quirky art prompts through the museum and turn the visit into a light, playful date with plenty to react to together.

name: Under Our Skin
description: A talk-led date for deeper conversations on gender, identity, desire, and the ways art challenges how we see ourselves and others.

name: Can a Machine Be an Artist?
description: A thoughtful panel date about AI, creativity, authorship, and ownership, perfect if we want something modern and debate-worthy.
